qa_pairs.question: What is the Reference GPU Unit (RGU) value and the recommended core and memory allocation for a whole H100-80gb GPU on the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Rorqual cluster, a whole H100-80gb GPU has an RGU value of 12.2 and is recommended to be allocated 16 cores and 124 GB of memory.

qa_pairs.question: For the Rorqual cluster, what are the recommended core and memory allocations for an H100-1g.10gb GPU instance?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Rorqual cluster, an H100-1g.10gb GPU instance is recommended to be allocated 2 cores and 15 GB of memory. It has an RGU value of 1.74.

qa_pairs.question: What is the RGU value and the bundle characteristics (cores and memory) for an H100-3g.40gb GPU instance on the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Rorqual cluster, an H100-3g.40gb GPU instance has an RGU value of 6.1 and a bundle of 8 cores and 62.2 GB of memory. The recommended allocation for this instance is 8 cores and 62 GB of memory.
